query: severely underexposed dark photo crushed shadows black murky
message: anti_aesthetics/lighting: exposure extremes — severe underexposure, crushed shadows, dark murky atmosphere, mood-driven black tones

response.objective_caption: A person sits against a textured wall with their head bowed and their right hand raised to their forehead. A diagonal beam of light from the upper left illuminates the person's white cuff and part of their hand. The person wears dark clothing with a small colorful patch on the chest. Most of the frame is consumed by deep shadow, revealing only fragments of the figure and the wall behind them.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: The image employs extreme underexposure that crushes shadows into pure black, abstracting most of the figure and surroundings into a suffocating void. A person sits in clear emotional distress, holding their head in one hand with bowed posture, communicating anguish and despair. The overwhelming darkness and isolated setting against a bare textured wall evoke dread and psychological unease, with only a narrow shaft of light illuminating the subject's white cuff and hand as a stark focal point within the oppressive gloom.
